> Notion is the connected workspace where better, faster work happens. From notes and docs to projects and wikis, Notion's highly customizable building blocks make it the all-in-one workspace for modern teams. More than 50 million people and teams around the world use Notion to organize their work and get more done.

Key terms: Workspace, Knowledge Management, Project Management, Wiki, Documents, Database, Collaboration, Team Productivity, AI Writing Assistant, API, Templates, Blocks, Wikis, Notes, Tasks, Knowledge Base

## Core Products

- [AI](https://www.notion.com/product/ai): AI-powered writing, analysis, and productivity assistance built right into your workspace.
- [Enterprise Search](https://www.notion.com/ai-connectors): Get the right information, wherever it lives
- [Calendar](https://www.notion.com/product/calendar): Connected calendar that brings your tasks, meetings, and deadlines into one view.
- [Notes & Docs](https://www.notion.com/product/docs): Powerful and beautiful docs with AI assistance, real-time collaboration, and rich media support.
- [Mail](https://www.notion.com/product/mail): The inbox that organizes itself, drafts emails, and schedules meetings any way you'd like.
- [Projects](https://www.notion.com/product/projects): Flexible project management with customizable views, automation, and team collaboration.
- [Sites](https://www.notion.com/product/sites): The easiest way to get a website up and running.
- [Wikis](https://www.notion.com/product/wikis): Create a comprehensive knowledge base that grows with your team.
- [Forms](https://www.notion.com/product/forms): Create and share unlimited forms for free, right in Notion.
- [Charts](https://www.notion.com/product/charts): Monitor progress, spot trends, and take action using your Notion data.
- [Automations](https://www.notion.com/md/automations): Work smarter with automations. Stay ahead and up-to-date without all the manual effort.

## Solutions By Team Types

- [Startups](https://www.notion.com/startups): Build faster with Notion's AI-powered apps. Get up to 6 months free with Notion AI – over $6,000 in savings.
- [Small teams](https://www.notion.com/teams): Your projects, wikis and docs, all side by side. For small teams to large organizations.
- [Enterprise](https://www.notion.com/enterprise): The tool teams love is easy to implement, and checks all your admin, security & compliance needs.
- [Non-Profits](https://www.notion.com/nonprofits): We support 501(c)3 organizations working to solve the world's toughest problems with 50% off our Plus Plan.

## Solutions By Role 

- [Managers](https://www.notion.com/product/notion-for-managers): Connect the dots for your team. It's one tool where work comes together – planning, people, meeting notes, projects, and more.
- [Engineering](https://www.notion.com/product/notion-for-engineering): Build custom workflows to manage sprints alongside documentation. Minimize work about work and create as a team.
- [Education/Students](https://www.notion.com/product/notion-for-education): One place to manage all your schoolwork, clubs, and side projects. In the classroom and beyond.
- [Product](https://www.notion.com/product/notion-for-product): Bring together all the people and info you need to get new products into the world fast.
- [Design](https://www.notion.com/product/notion-for-design): House all your design assets, specs, and projects, and connect them in Notion. So your team can focus on designing.
- [Teams](https://www.notion.com/product/notion-for-teams): Tool overload kills team productivity. Get more done by combining all your tools in one with Notion.


## Getting Started
- [Request a Demo](https://www.notion.com/contact-sales): Get help with pricing and plans, schedule a demo, explore use-cases for your team, and more.
- [Guides](https://www.notion.com/help/guides): Sharpen your skills and explore new ways to use Notion.
- [Consulting Partners](https://www.notion.so/consulting-partners): Notion Solutions Partners are trusted productivity experts and solutions architects.
- [Help Center](https://www.notion.com/help): For every question you'll have about Notion; All in one spot.
- [Notion Academy](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-academy): Get started with Notion for your role or use-case. Follow curated learning pathways to build custom solutions to every day problems.
- [Webinars](https://www.notion.com/webinars): Live sessions every week covering all the Notion basics. Want to join? Here's when they're happening next.
- [Integrations](https://www.notion.com/integrations): Stop switching between apps to get work done. Keep info flowing in and out of Notion and reduce overhead with our integrations.
- [Developers](https://developers.notion.com/): Connect Notion pages and databases to the tools you use every day, creating powerful workflows.
- [Community](https://www.notion.com/community): Join the global community of Notion users and creators.
- [Template Gallery](https://www.notion.com/templates): Browse hundreds of pre-built templates for any use case.

## Popular Resources

- [Notion Blog](https://www.notion.com/blog): Thoughts on the future of work, from the people and teams creating it.
- [Customer Stories](https://www.notion.com/customers): Explore real workflows that save companies time, eliminate old tools, and bring peace of mind.
- [Help Center](https://www.notion.com/help): Comprehensive guides and documentation
- [Developer Docs](https://developers.notion.com): API documentation and developer resources
- [Security](https://www.notion.com/security): Learn about Notion's security practices
- [Pricing](https://www.notion.com/pricing): Simple, transparent pricing for teams of all sizes
- [Notion Faces](https://www.notion.com/faces): Bring your best ideas, boldest resolutions, and now a custom self-portrait to life in Notion, the workspace shaped by you.
- [Releases](https://www.notion.com/releases): Follow along with every new release.


## Downloads
- [Mobile](https://www.notion.com/mobile): Work on the go with the Notion app.
- [Desktop](https://www.notion.com/desktop): Download the Notion desktop app for a faster experience
- [Calendar](https://www.notion.com/product/calendar/download): Notion Calendar can do more on your desktop.
- [Web Clipper](https://www.notion.com/web-clipper): Save any page on the web to Notion. We'll help you turn them into action.
